class.name: PDFEncoder
class.description: Singlebyte Encodings See the [PDFEncoder.Encoding] for the list of available single byte encodings. Multibyte Encodings The following character sets for multi-byte character set are available: 1. "GB-EUC-H" EUC-CN encoding 2. "GB-EUC-V" - Vertical writing version of GB-EUC-H 3. "GBK-EUC-H" - Microsoft Code Page 936 (lfCharSet 0x86) GBK encoding 4. "GBK-EUC-V" - Vertical writing version of GBK-EUC-H 5. "ETen-B5-H" - Microsoft Code Page 950 (lfCharSet 0x88) Big Five character set with ETen extensions 6. "ETen-B5-V" - Vertical writing version of ETen-B5-H 7. "90ms-RKSJ-H" - Microsoft Code Page 932, JIS X 0208 character 8. "90ms-RKSJ-V" - Vertical writing version of 90ms-RKSJ-V 9. "90msp-RKSJ-H" - Microsoft Code Page 932, JIS X 0208 character (proportional) 10. "EUC-H" - JIS X 0208 character set, EUC-JP encoding 11. "EUC-V" - Vertical writing version of EUC-H 12. "KSC-EUC-H" - KS X 1001:1992 character set, EUC-KR encoding 13. "KSC-EUC-V" - Vertical writing version of KSC-EUC-V 14. "KSCms-UHC-H" - Microsoft Code Page 949 (lfCharSet 0x81), KS X 1001:1992 character set plus 8822 additional hangul, Unified Hangul Code (UHC) encoding (proportional) 15. "KSCms-UHC-HW-H" - Microsoft Code Page 949 (lfCharSet 0x81), KS X 1001:1992 character set plus 8822 additional hangul, Unified Hangul Code (UHC) encoding (fixed width) 16. "KSCms-UHC-HW-V" - Vertical writing version of KSCms-UHC-HW-H Note that the application has to invoke the following functions before using multibyte encodings: 1. [method PDFDocument.encodings_use_cns] - It makes simplified Chinese Encodings(GB-EUC-H, GB-EUC-V, GBK-EUC-H, GBK-EUC-V) to become available. 2. [method PDFDocument.encodings_use_cnt] - It makes traditional Chinese Encodings(ETen-B5-H, ETen-B5-V) to become available. 3. [method PDFDocument.encodings_use_jp] - It makes Japanese Encodings(90ms-RKSJ-H, 90ms-RKSJ-V, 90msp-RKSJ-H, EUC-H, EUC-V) to become available. 4. [method PDFDocument.encodings_use_kr] - It makes Korean Encodings (KSC-EUC-H, KSC-EUC-V, KSCms-UHC-H, KSCms-UHC-HW-H, KSCms-UHC-HW-V) to become available.

method.name: get_byte_type
method.description: Returns the type of byte in the text at position index.

method.name: get_encoding_string
method.description: Returns the encoding name for the given value. These are all single byte encodings.

method.name: get_type
method.description: Gets the type of an encoding object.

method.name: get_unicode
method.description: Converts a specified character code to unicode.

method.name: get_writing_mode
method.description: Returns the writing mode for the encoding object.

constants.constant: Use the built-in encoding of a font. "FontSpecific".
It is the default encoding of PDF. "StandardEncoding".
The standard encoding of Mac OS. "MacRomanEncoding".
This encoder is an encoder for single byte characters.
This encoder is an encoder for multi byte characters.
This encoder is uninitialized. (May be it is an encoder for multi byte characters.)
Lead byte of a double-byte character.
Trailing byte of a double-byte character.
Invalid encoder or cannot judge the byte type.
